title: calophyllum articulatum
intro: Calophyllum articulatum, also known as the "kamani" or "kamani tree", is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae, native to the Indo-Pacific region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Calophyllum articulatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. In traditional medicine, the plant's leaves, bark, and seeds are often prepared into herbal teas, ointments, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
